message:
test(wave-72): trait coverage for actor, monitor, service/service, io_driver

8 new tests covering Clone/Copy/Hash/Debug/Default/PartialEq/Eq/Ord derives
across ActorId, ActorState, MailboxConfig, MonitorRef, DownReason,
CancellationMode, TowerAdapterError, IoStats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
